title: 🩺 Clinical Lab Results Interpreter
subtitle: Paste your lab results and get an instant interpretation.
disclaimer: ⚠️ *Educational purposes only — not a substitute for medical advice.*
placeholder: e.g. Ferritin 8 ng/mL, Hemoglobin 10.2 g/dL, Glucose 140 mg/dL, CRP 45 mg/L
no_interp:
❌ No values recognized.

Expected format: `Ferritin 50 ng/mL` or `Glucose 140 mg/dL`

Supported parameters: Ferritin, Hemoglobin, Glucose, HbA1c, CRP, TSH, Creatinine, Triglycerides, Cholesterol, Platelets, Vitamin D, INR, Urea, Sodium, Potassium
sidebar_how_text:
1. Paste your lab results
2. Each value is extracted and compared to clinical thresholds
3. You get an interpretation and recommendations

⚠️ This tool does NOT use AI or machine learning. It uses clinical rules and thresholds.
